news_title: Salarius Pharmaceuticals Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
summary: Salarius Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: SLRX)has regained compliance with Nasdaq's Minimum Bid Price Requirement (Rule 5550(a)(2)) as of September 4, 2025. The company still needs to meet the Equity Standard Requirement (Rule 5550(b)(1)) byOctober 20, 2025to maintain its listing.SLRX will be under aMandatory Panel Monitor for one yearstarting September 4, 2025. Additionally, the company has previously announced adefinitive merger agreement with Decoy Therapeuticson January 13, 2025. Post-merger, the combined entity will operate as Decoy Therapeutics, focusing on developing peptide conjugate therapeutics.
